arts.ttl: Middlesbrough vs Leeds Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Middlesbrough, currently fifth in the Championship, host third-placed Leeds at the Riverside Stadium on Tuesday, April 8th, at 20:00. Both teams are vying for a coveted spot in the promotion playoffs....

arts.ttl: Ross McCormack shares Leeds United striker worry on talkSPORT
arts.sum: “It’s not just the starting 11, Sheffield United are bringing players like Kieffer Moore, Tom Cannon, Callum O’Hare on in the striking areas, Leeds haven’t really got anyone, we start with (Joel) Piroe up top and if it’s not happening, they’ve got a young boy (Mateo) Joseph who’s unproved and is not a natural goalscorer. Leeds United’s trip to Middlesbrough tonight is arguably the biggest game of the season so far, with a win needed to put aside the poor run of current form.

arts.ttl: Potential Leeds United XI vs Middlesbrough with Ampadu and Gnonto calls made
arts.sum: With Pascal Struijk out for at least the next two games, Leeds United boss Daniel Farke may opt to field Ethan Ampadu at centre-back against Middlesbrough tonight. Prior to Ampadu’s knee injury, United had kept six clean sheets in seven games with the pair at centre-half.

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer news: Modibo Sagnan 'closely interesting' Championship promotion contenders
arts.sum: Leeds United are allegedly contemplating an approach for a defender who is facing relegation with a top-flight club in one of European football's major leagues.

arts.ttl: Boro v Leeds United preview: Farke selection news
arts.sum: Leeds United travel up to Middlesbrough this evening knowing that they will need to get back to winning ways as soon as possible after three straight draws. It means that there will be a change at centre-back this evening, but the question is whether Ethan Ampadu takes his place, or remains in midfield to retain balance and control.

arts.sum: A summer clearout is anticipated at Montpellier HSC. La Paillade are rock-bottom of Ligue 1 and 11 points behind Stade de Reims, who occupy the relegation spot with just six games remaining.…

arts.ttl: Leeds United ‘keen’ to sign 25-year-old from relegation doomed club
arts.sum: Leeds United are in contention to return to the Premier League via direct promotion this season. The Championship club dropped to the third spot, a point behind second placed Sheffield United and two behind leaders Burnley. Leeds, meanwhile, have started working on improving their squad for next season.
